orgs.settings.govVerification.title: Government Verification
orgs.settings.govVerification.label: Require OTP-based government verification
orgs.settings.govVerification.helperOff: OFF — PAN, Aadhaar, GSTIN, and TAN numbers are stored as unverified details to assist GST, ITR, and loan filing. No OTP is required from the customer.
orgs.settings.govVerification.helperOn: ON — Each document (PAN, Aadhaar, GSTIN, TAN) requires OTP-based government verification before it is marked verified. Unverified numbers are saved as pending until the customer completes OTP.
orgs.settings.govVerification.saveError: Failed to save government verification setting

permissions.catalog.title: Permission Catalog
permissions.catalog.subtitle: Master list of all permissions
permissions.catalog.caveat: A permission only takes effect once backend code enforces it. New entries appear in the role matrix but protect nothing until they're wired in code.
permissions.catalog.caveatShort: This entry won't enforce anything until referenced in backend code.
permissions.catalog.rolesTooltip: {{count}} role(s) hold this permission — click to view
permissions.types.title: Resource & Action types
permissions.types.subtitle: Rename or hide the building blocks permissions are composed from. Keys are immutable.
permissions.create.title: Create permission
permissions.create.resourceHint: Pick an existing resource or type a new one
permissions.create.newResourceType: New resource type — will be added to the catalog
permissions.create.newActionType: New action type — will be added to the catalog
permissions.create.duplicate: A permission with this code already exists.
permissions.edit.title: Edit permission
permissions.edit.codeImmutable: The code can't be changed. Deactivate and create a new one if it's wrong.
permissions.deactivate.confirm: Deactivate {{code}}? It will be hidden from new grants. You can reactivate it later.
permissions.deactivate.warnReferenced: {{code}} is currently granted to {{count}} role(s). Deactivating won't remove existing grants but the permission will stop appearing for new grants. Continue?
permissions.deactivate.blocked: Can't deactivate — {{code}} is still used by {{count}} role(s). Remove it from those roles first.
permissions.empty.title: No permissions yet
permissions.empty.desc: Create your first permission to populate the role matrix.
permissions.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
permissions.error.forbidden: You don't have permission to manage the catalog.
users.addUser.title: Add User
users.addUser.subtitle: Create a user, assign a role, and optionally grant extra permissions.
users.addUser.platformCaveat: Platform roles are powerful and apply across all organizations. SUPER_ADMIN can only be assigned by a SUPER_ADMIN.
users.addUser.scopeSwitchConfirm: Switching scope will clear your role and override selections. Continue?
users.addUser.passwordHint: For local sign-in during development. In production the user receives an invite — leave blank to send an invite.
users.addUser.roleNotAssignable: You can't assign this role — it includes access beyond your own.
users.addUser.overridesNote: Role permissions are inherited automatically. These are extra direct grants on top of the role. You can only grant permissions you hold yourself.
users.addUser.notGrantable: You can't grant this permission because it isn't part of your own access.
users.addUser.alreadyInherited: Already granted by the role — no need to add it directly.
users.editUser.denyHint: Turn off to deny this inherited permission for this user.
users.addUser.effectiveSummary: This user will have {{total}} permissions: {{roleCount}} from role + {{overrideCount}} direct overrides.
users.addUser.err.contactRequired: Enter an email or a phone number.
users.addUser.err.duplicate: A user with this email or phone already exists.
users.addUser.err.escalation: Some selections exceed your own access and were rejected.
users.addUser.err.generic: Couldn't create the user. Please try again.
users.attrs.panKeepHint: Leave blank to keep the current PAN.
users.attrs.err.pan: PAN must be in AAAAA9999A format.
users.attrs.err.aadhaar: Aadhaar last-4 must be exactly 4 digits.
users.attrs.err.dob: Date of birth cannot be in the future.
users.editUser.title: Edit User
users.editUser.subtitle: Update the user's details, role, and permissions. Email, phone and scope can't be changed.
users.editUser.immutableNote: These fields can't be changed after creation.
users.editUser.err.generic: Couldn't update the user. Please try again.
users.deleteUser.confirm: Delete {{name}}? They will lose access immediately. This can't be undone from here.
users.deleteUser.err.self: You can't delete your own account.
users.deleteUser.err.lastAdmin: Can't delete the last active super-admin. Assign the role to another user first.
users.deleteUser.err.generic: Couldn't delete the user. Please try again.

twofa.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twofa.subtitle: Add an extra layer of security to your account with TOTP-based 2FA.
twofa.section.title: Authenticator App (TOTP)
twofa.enabled.headline: 2FA is active on your account
twofa.disabled.headline: 2FA is not enabled
twofa.disabled.desc: Enable 2FA to protect your account with a time-based one-time password.
twofa.enroll.title: Set up Two-Factor Authentication
twofa.enroll.desc: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app (e.g. Google Authenticator, Authy).
twofa.enroll.qrAriaLabel: QR code for authenticator app setup
twofa.enroll.manualEntry: Or enter this code manually in your authenticator app:
twofa.confirm.title: Verify your authenticator
twofa.confirm.desc: Enter the 6-digit code shown in your authenticator app.
twofa.recovery.title: Save your recovery codes
twofa.recovery.desc: Store these codes somewhere safe. Each can be used once to sign in if you lose your authenticator.
twofa.recovery.warningDesc: These recovery codes will not be shown again. Store them in a safe place.
twofa.recovery.acknowledge: I have saved my recovery codes in a safe place
twofa.disable.title: Disable Two-Factor Authentication
twofa.disable.desc: Enter your current 6-digit TOTP code or a recovery code to disable 2FA.
twofa.disable.codeHint: Enter your 6-digit authenticator code, or one of your recovery codes.
